---
title: "Git trials and errors"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## This is a test

test tes

```{r}
getwd()
```

t test test test

![](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcRoBDj0Q0_bGlNMvejcxs7bFI1MHZTH42oxtxl0O2caPg&s=10){width="412"}

![](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSwBJo8xDDtwD4Kk6wmUoqbd9BKWmHL6iZg-8Sa8F-zRg&s){width="371"}
